rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0010
rows.name:
I really wanted to help with
the Ares's maintenance, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0020
rows.name: Since I'm a BLADE now too,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0030
rows.name:
they kicked me out, telling me
to prioritize those duties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0040
rows.name: Don't you think that's cruel?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Believe it or not, I used to be a
member of the Ares maintenance team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_JNK0010
rows.name: Show Interest

rows.label: xs31150100_SEL0010
rows.name: Ask about Al.

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0060
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0070
rows.name: The first time we met[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0080
rows.name:
was right around when I was
assigned to Elma-san's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_JNK0020
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: xs31150100_SEL0020
rows.name: Tell her her maintenance skills are the best in the universe.

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0090
rows.name: Even if it's a lie, that makes me happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0100
rows.name: Thank you very much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0110
rows.name: The first time I met Al-san[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0120
rows.name:
was right around when I was
assigned to Elma-san's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0130
rows.name:
Because of his personality, his
teammates kept their distance,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0140
rows.name: so Al-san was always somewhat alone[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0150
rows.name: But he was always very friendly to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0160
rows.name: A long time ago, Al-san[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0170
rows.name: had a younger sister about my age.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0180
rows.name:
They were separated while fleeing a
country in an unstable situation,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0190
rows.name: and he had not been able to see her since[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0200
rows.name:
Al-san used to say that people
need a place to belong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0210
rows.name:
He did not mean a specific location
in the world, like an address[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0220
rows.name:
He meant a place where
someone is waiting for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0230
rows.name:
A place where the people you
trust as comrades gather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0240
rows.name:
That's the kind of place
he was talking about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0250
rows.name: I'm sure[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0260
rows.name:
The place where his sister and family
were was Al-san's place to belong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0270
rows.name: But after he lost sight of that,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0280
rows.name:
Al-san went up into space to make the
entire Earth his place to belong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0290
rows.name:
To hold onto the conviction that his family
was definitely alive somewhere on Earth[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0300
rows.name:
To prove to himself that it was
a place he needed to protect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0310
rows.name: After we lost Earth,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0320
rows.name:
the White Whale became
Al-san's place to belong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0330
rows.name:
"That's why, Lin, you're
my family now too..."[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0340
rows.name: That's what Al-san told me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0350
rows.name: Those words[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0360
rows.name: made me happier than anything else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0370
rows.name: But[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0380
rows.name: I can't be like I used to be[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0390
rows.name:
I can't just innocently lean
on Al-san's kindness anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0400
rows.name: Because while Al-san was gone[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0410
rows.name: Too many sad things have happened[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_JNK0030
rows.name: Support

rows.label: xs31150100_SEL0030
rows.name: Tell her to take things slowly.

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0420
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―You're right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0430
rows.name:
With everything that's happened, I
might have been rushing too much,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0440
rows.name:
feeling like I needed to settle
these feelings right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_JNK0040
rows.name: Put at Ease

rows.label: xs31150100_SEL0040
rows.name: Tell her she is overthinking it.

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0450
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―You're right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0460
rows.name: I might have been overthinking it,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0470
rows.name:
feeling like I had to find
an answer for everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0480
rows.name: Thank you for listening to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31150100_MSG0490
rows.name:
Putting it into words helped
me calm down a little.[ST:wait ]
